transcription.text: where to dine in Bronxville in Westchester County. I recently went to this Mexican restaurant in Bronxville to celebrate my mom's birthday, and my family loved it. It was a quick trip from New York City on the Metro North, and this is what my family had to say about the food. Look how beautiful this thing looks. Very delicious. They cracked me up because they love to be food critics. And this means a lot for my Dominican dad, who is very particular and almost always prefers Dominican food over anything else. But as you can see, the food was great, and it was such a cozy spot. We had such a good time celebrating my mom's birthday. And I even love a dessert, and I'm not a dessert person. The name of this restaurant is La Casa Bronxville. By the way, this restaurant is family owned by a father and son, and they even have a second La Casa location in purchase. If you've been, let me know what you think in the comments, and follow for more.
